title: CI: no test run with default features only
description: All CI test jobs run --all-features. The published crate defaults to 'file' and 'env' only. If a bug is introduced that only manifests with default features (e.g. a missing re-export, a feature-conditional compilation error), CI will not catch it. Add a test job that runs 'cargo test' (default features) and 'cargo test --no-default-features'.
